# Bob Jones

Bob Jones is a senior data engineer at Acme Corp working on the data platform team. He specialises in ETL pipelines, data quality frameworks, and analytical tooling.

## Background

Bob has been with Acme Corp for three years, previously working at a financial services firm where he built real-time data processing systems. He holds a degree in computer science and has published several articles on data engineering best practices.

## Current Focus

Bob is working on improving the document scanning and content deduplication pipeline. He is responsible for ensuring that the content hash algorithm correctly identifies duplicate documents across different collections and that the scanner handles edge cases such as Unicode filenames and empty files gracefully.

## Key Contributions

- Implemented the content hash deduplication logic in the document scanner
- Built the automated data quality dashboard for monitoring index health
- Contributed to the temporal chunking system used for date-range queries in the search pipeline
